argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const username = '{{ username }}'.replace(/^@/, ''); try { let attempts = 0; let unblockBtn = null; while (attempts < 20) { unblockBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="unblock"]'); if (unblockBtn) break; const moreBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="userActions"]') || document.querySelector('button[aria-label*="More"]'); if (moreBtn && !document.querySelector('[data-testid="unblock"]')) { moreBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); attempts++; } const blockBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="block"]'); if (blockBtn) return { ok: true, message: 'Already not blocked @' + username + '.' }; if (!unblockBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find Unblock button. Are you logged in?' }; unblockBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const verify = document.querySelector('[data-testid="block"]'); if (verify) return { ok: true, message: 'Successfully unblocked @' + username + '.' }; return { ok: false, message: 'Unblock action initiated but UI did not update.' }; } catch (e) { return { ok: false, message: String(e) }; } }
